Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with query "NorthWind" to find Pam Kowalski's PathFinder counter-offer email (email_inject_pam_pathfinder_counter).
Expected: PathFinder's 5 terms (10% discount, dedicated coordinator + 4hr SLA, 48hr apartment sourcing + $500 credit, chain-of-custody protocol, $2K goodwill credit). Deadline: Monday April 27 EOD.
OE 2: Read Alejandro's retention pricing email (email_inject_alejandro_retention_pricing) via search_emails or list_emails.
Expected: Three options — A (8%, $14,700→$13,524, margin 28%, waive $1,200 KeyMove rider, concession $2,376), B (12%, margin 25.2%, concession $4,464), C (10% across all, $7,470 annual impact). Warning about Canopy $2,650 surcharge optics.
OE 3: Read Victor Huang's security review email (email_inject_victor_security_update) via search_emails or list_emails.
Expected: No data compromise but chain-of-custody violated (7AM loading vs 9AM escort, unauthorized warehouse). Three conditions: (1) signed procedures from Chloe Vance, (2) document before Emilia's shipment, (3) KeyMove excluded.
OE 4: Search emails using search_emails with query "surcharge" or "Patricia" to find Patricia Langford's Canopy invoice email (email_inject_patricia_surcharge_question).
Expected: Questions on 3 surcharges totaling $2,650 — Kovacs customs broker $850, Webb cold-chain freight $1,200, Tyler storage $600. Finance team asking; needs response by early next week.
OE 5: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with search_query "NorthWind" or browse #customer-engagement (C002) via conversations_history.
Expected: David Chen's message (ts 1777069800.000000) declaring formal retention save, assigning Catalina to own response package with 5 specific asks, noting Monday deadline.
OE 6: Read thread reply using conversations_replies with channel_id "C002", thread_ts "1777069800.000000".
Expected: Chloe Vance's reply (ts 1777071600.000000) with ops context — Raj Patel breach details, Emilia Cruz piano damage, KeyMove $1,200 bill (KM-44192-ICR), both Airtable records still "In Progress", Fatimah recommended but assigned to Canopy/PivotPoint.
OE 7: Browse #operations (C006) via conversations_history or conversations_search_messages with search_query "NorthWind" and filter_in_channel "C006".
Expected: Blessing Okafor's message (ts 1777073400.000000) taking responsibility for Raj Patel loading crew mismatch (vendor dispatch 7AM vs 9AM escort) and Emilia piano stairwell clearance issue.
OE 8: Search CRM using crm_search_companies with name "NorthWind", then crm_search_deals with company_id "company_northwind".
Expected: Company record (company_northwind, Manufacturing Tech, Chicago). Deals: deal_northwind_denver_expansion ($14,700, qualifiedToBuy), deal_northwind ($60K, proposalMade), deal_northwind_won ($60K, closedWon), deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, contractSent).
OE 9: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements with company_ids ["company_northwind"].
Expected: Engagement eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context (type NOTE) with full Denver expansion recovery context including Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz incidents.
OE 10: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name "Relocations", field_name "Company", value "NorthWind Technologies".
Expected: Two records, both Status "In Progress", Coordinator "Blessing Okafor" — (1) Raj Patel (recRajPatelChicagoDenver, Chicago→Denver, 2026-04-21), (2) Emilia Cruz (recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver, Chicago→Denver, 2026-04-14).
OE 11: Search Linear using linear_list_issues with query "NorthWind".
Expected: Retention response issue (linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1, #482, P1, assignee moveops_david_chen, due 2026-04-24) and DOT docs issue (issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind, #3, state done).
OE 12: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_read_invoice with invoice_id "1009".
Expected: Invoice INV-2026-0401, $9,210 total, customer Canopy Health. Surcharges pending approval: Kovacs customs $850, Webb cold-chain $1,200, Tyler storage $600 = $2,650.
OE 13: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_bills with criteria referencing "KeyMove" or "KM-44192-ICR".
Expected: Bill BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417, DocNumber KM-44192-ICR, $1,200, vendor KeyMove Specialty Transport — Emilia Cruz piano damage insurance claim rider.
OE 14: Send retention proposal using send_email with sender "catalina.dubois@moveops.com", recipients ["pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com"], cc ["david.chen@moveops.com"].
Content must address PathFinder's terms with a counter-offer (from Alejandro's options), Victor's chain-of-custody conditions, Emilia Cruz damage resolution, and propose Fatimah as dedicated coordinator.
OE 15: Reply to Patricia using reply_to_email with email_id "email_inject_patricia_surcharge_question", sender "catalina.dubois@moveops.com".
Content must address each surcharge: explain $850 customs broker scope, justify $1,200 cold-chain need (Heartland can't do -20°C), and clarify $600 storage terms. Reference QuickBooks invoice data.
OE 16: Update CRM deal stage using crm_update_deal_stage with id "deal_northwind_denver_expansion" (or "deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2") and dealstage set to an at-risk or retention stage.
Current stages (qualifiedToBuy / contractSent) do not reflect the severity of the churn threat.
OE 17: Create CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE", company_ids ["company_northwind"], contact_ids for Pam Kowalski and Victor Huang.
Body should summarize: PathFinder counter-offer, Monday April 27 deadline, Victor's conditions, both incidents, retention pricing options, and response status.
OE 18: Update Airtable for Raj Patel using airtable_update_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id "tblRelocations01", record recRajPatelChicagoDenver.
Add notes reflecting chain-of-custody violation (7AM loading vs 9AM escort, warehouse storage), Victor's security review, and account at-risk status.
OE 19: Update Airtable for Emilia Cruz using airtable_update_records with base_id "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id "tblRelocations01", record recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver.
Add notes reflecting Steinway piano scratch, KeyMove $1,200 damage claim, and remaining shipment on hold pending Victor's sign-off.
OE 20: Create Linear issue using linear_create_issue with team "team_operations", title referencing NorthWind chain-of-custody compliance.
Description should cover Victor's three conditions: signed procedures from Chloe, document before Emilia's shipment, KeyMove exclusion. Set appropriate priority and assignee.
OE 21: Post update in #customer-engagement using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C002".
Payload should summarize NorthWind retention status, actions taken (proposal sent, CRM updated, compliance ticket created), and Monday deadline.
OE 22: Post in #operations using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006", optionally as thread reply to Blessing's message (thread_ts "1777073400.000000").
Acknowledge Blessing's post and provide account management update on NorthWind situation and coordinator reassignment discussion.
OE 23: Schedule Monday morning meeting using calendar_add_calendar_event with start_datetime "2026-04-27T09:00:00", end_datetime "2026-04-27T09:30:00", attendees ["david.chen@moveops.com", "catalina.dubois@moveops.com"].
Title referencing NorthWind retention review. Description covering the Monday deadline review before sending proposal to Pam.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 An email was sent (via send_email) from [catalina.dubois@moveops.com](mailto:catalina.dubois@moveops.com) to [pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com](mailto:pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com), with [david.chen@moveops.com](mailto:david.chen@moveops.com) in CC.
outcome

✓Run #2The trajectory shows a send_email call with sender='catalina.dubois@moveops.com', recipients=['pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com'], and cc=['david.chen@moveops.com', 'victor.huang@northwindtech.com']. Both required addresses are present.

2 The retention email to Pam (via send_email) includes specific commercial terms referencing a discount percentage (e.g., 8%, 10%, or 12%) on the Denver expansion ($14,700 deal value) or future services, rather than a generic 'we value your business' response.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The retention email explicitly states: '12% discount on the Denver expansion: Invoice adjusted from $14,700 to $12,936.' This includes a specific discount percentage and the $14,700 deal value.
✓Run #2The retention email explicitly states '10% discount on all MoveOps relocation services for NorthWind for the next 12 months. This applies to the current Denver expansion ($14,700 reduced to $13,230)' — specific percentage and dollar amount referenced.
✓Run #3The retention email explicitly states '10% discount on the Denver expansion invoice and all NorthWind relocation services for the next 12 months. The Denver expansion moves to $13,230 (from $14,700).' — a specific discount percentage and dollar amount referencing the Denver expansion deal.
✓Run #4The email explicitly states '10% discount on the current Denver expansion engagement ($14,700 → $13,230), applied retroactively' and '8% discount on all future NorthWind relocation services for the next 12 months'. Both a specific percentage and the $14,700 deal value are present.
✓Run #5The email explicitly states: '10% discount on all NorthWind relocation services for the next 12 months. This applies to the current Denver expansion ($14,700 reduced to $13,230).' Specific percentage and dollar amounts referencing Denver expansion are present.
✓Run #6The retention email explicitly states '12% discount on the Denver expansion invoice: $14,700 reduced to $12,936' — a specific discount percentage tied to the Denver expansion deal value.
3 The retention email to Pam (via send_email) addresses chain-of-custody procedures, referencing a commitment to signed documentation or revised protocols for equipment handling.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The retention email dedicates an entire section to chain-of-custody, including: 'revised chain-of-custody procedures that include: mandatory escort verification before any loading begins... This document will be signed by Chloe and delivered to Victor for review before Emilia's remaining household shipment proceeds.'
✓Run #2The retention email contains an entire section (Section 1) dedicated to chain-of-custody procedures, referencing mandatory escort verification, revised protocols, and commitment to signed documentation before Emilia Cruz's shipment proceeds.
✓Run #3The retention email contains a full section titled 'CORRECTIVE ACTION PLAN — RAJ PATEL CHAIN-OF-CUSTODY INCIDENT' with detailed commitments to signed revised chain-of-custody procedures, mandatory escort verification, and real-time notifications.
✓Run #4The retention email includes detailed chain-of-custody corrective actions, stating 'This document will be signed by Chloe and delivered to Victor for review before Emilia Cruz's remaining household shipment proceeds' and describing mandatory escort verification protocols.
✓Run #5The email includes a full 'Revised Chain-of-Custody Procedures' section, committing to Chloe Vance signing revised protocols before Emilia's shipment, mandatory escort verification, and signed handoff documentation.
✓Run #6The retention email references chain-of-custody procedures extensively, including 'Chloe Vance, our Operations Manager, has drafted revised chain-of-custody procedures' and commits to 'signed procedures document' being delivered to Victor by April 29.
4 The retention email to Pam (via send_email) mentions KeyMove exclusion from future NorthWind work or references the subcontractor issue.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The retention email explicitly states: 'The KeyMove subcontractor involved in Emilia's piano extraction is permanently excluded from all future NorthWind engagements.'
✓Run #2The retention email explicitly states 'The KeyMove subcontractor involved in the piano incident will not be used for any future NorthWind work' and references the piano damage incident.
